package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_tests_import_gin: Service-level tests that depend on Gin when the service contract is supposed to be transport-neutral.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule182NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule182NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule182NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario182Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule182NegativeService, input Rule182NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
